t.t-value: state.activeVisit and state.activeVisit.beat_line_id and state.activeVisit.beat_line_id[0] === line.id

div.div: No beat has been assigned for today. Contact your manager.
Your GPS location will be recorded for attendance. Tap below to request GPS permission if not already done.
You have an active visit. Please end it before checking out.

Great work today!
You completed visits and placed orders.

div.label: GPS Location

t.div: GPS permission denied. Enable location in your browser settings, then tap "Get GPS".

div.div: GPS is optional — visit will proceed without it.

div.t: No orders placed — marked unproductive. You can override below.
